'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 121''' was the one hundred twenty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 21]], [[2004]]. It was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Matthew Harvey]], [[Andy Lane]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Yavin Vassilika|The Yavin Vassilika]]
*[[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|General Rieekan]]
*[[Khabarakh]] and the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]]
*[[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]]
*[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Arithmetic
*[[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]]
*[[Troig/Legends|Troigs]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Millaflower/Legends|Millaflowers]]
*[[8t88/Legends|8t88]]
*[[Code cylinder/Legends|Imperial Code Cylinders]]
*[[Star Jewel/Legends|Jabba the Hutts Space Cruiser]]
